metadata.name: riding the wave
metadata.author: MilkDrop2077 vs martin
metadata.source: MilkDrop2077 vs martin - riding the wave.milk

perFrameCode: megabuf (n+4) = megabuf(n+3); megabuf (n+5) = bc;  megabuf (n+6) = bs ;
fg = 0.5; Q=4; omega = 6.283*min(0.5,fg/fps); tcos = cos (omega); alpha = sin(omega)/(2*Q);
b0=(1-tcos)/2; b1=1-tcos; b2=(1-tcos)/2; a0=1+alpha; a1=-2*tcos; a2=1-alpha;
Xa = reg33; LOa= b0a0*Xa + b1a0*in1a + b2a0*in2a - a1a0*ou1a - a2a0*ou2a;
